'''âw-b-k-m''' ('''kawabkemoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:flatterize|flatterize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-b-k-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:flatterize|flatterize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-b-k-m
|-
! Lemma
| kawabkemoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwabkemoko|thiwabkemoko]] || [[word:jiwabkemoko|jiwabkemoko]] || [[word:shiwabkemoko|shiwabkemoko]] || [[word:kiwabkemoko|kiwabkemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwabkemoko|thuthuwabkemoko]] || [[word:jujuwabkemoko|jujuwabkemoko]] || [[word:shushuwabkemoko|shushuwabkemoko]] || [[word:kukuwabkemoko|kukuwabkemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwabkemoko|thuwabkemoko]] || [[word:juwabkemoko|juwabkemoko]] || [[word:shuwabkemoko|shuwabkemoko]] || [[word:kuwabkemoko|kuwabkemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwabkemoko|thuwabkemoko]] || [[word:juwabkemoko|juwabkemoko]] || [[word:shuwabkemoko|shuwabkemoko]] || [[word:kuwabkemoko|kuwabkemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewabkemoko|thewabkemoko]] || [[word:jewabkemoko|jewabkemoko]] || [[word:shewabkemoko|shewabkemoko]] || [[word:kewabkemoko|kewabkemoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowabkemoko|thowabkemoko]] || [[word:jowabkemoko|jowabkemoko]] || [[word:showabkemoko|showabkemoko]] || [[word:kowabkemoko|kowabkemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowabkemoko|thowabkemoko]] || [[word:jowabkemoko|jowabkemoko]] || [[word:showabkemoko|showabkemoko]] || [[word:kowabkemoko|kowabkemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwabkemoko|thĂŠwabkemoko]] || [[word:jĂŠwabkemoko|jĂŠwabkemoko]] || [[word:shĂŠwabkemoko|shĂŠwabkemoko]] || [[word:kĂŠwabkemoko|kĂŠwabkemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawabkemoko|thathawabkemoko]] || [[word:jajawabkemoko|jajawabkemoko]] || [[word:shashawabkemoko|shashawabkemoko]] || [[word:kakawabkemoko|kakawabkemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawabkemoko|thawabkemoko]] || [[word:jawabkemoko|jawabkemoko]] || [[word:shawabkemoko|shawabkemoko]] || [[word:kawabkemoko|kawabkemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawabkemoko|thawabkemoko]] || [[word:jawabkemoko|jawabkemoko]] || [[word:shawabkemoko|shawabkemoko]] || [[word:kawabkemoko|kawabkemoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
